name: ClawWatch
description: ClawWatch node agent: register with Worker, bind via link token or binding code, and report telemetry. Ships clawwatch-agent CLI plus a Gateway background service for adaptive reporting.

worker_base_url.description: ClawWatch Worker origin without trailing slash (e.g. https://your-worker.workers.dev). Required for the background reporting service.

state_path.description: Optional path to agent state JSON. Default: ~/.clawwatch/agent.json (or CLAWWATCH_STATE).
